form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 1660m at this track beaten 5 m by Sweet Addition (1:55.50) in 4yo+ No NR M on March 28 at $8.50. At the run before 4th (Sr2) over 1660m at this track, beaten 6 m by Iloveacalendergirl (1:56.50) in 4yo+ No NR M on March 21 at $15. Can play a role from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 4 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (1:56.50) beating Missed Consequences in 4yo+ No NR M on March 21 at $1.45. Two runs back won by 5.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:57.50) beating A Perfect Dance in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better M on March 14 at $1.35. A good draw can see her add to the winning streak.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 1660m at this track, beaten 7 m by Daisy Diana (1:56.00) in 4yo+ No NR M on April 4 at $34. Before that was well back in the run when 8th (Fr2) over 1660m at this track beaten 15 m by Sweet Addition (1:55.50) in 4yo+ No NR M on March 28 at $34. This will fully test.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 1.1 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (1:57.70) beating Lenny Lincoln in NR 54 to 60 on July 8 at $4.40. Proven fresh so can continue the good form from last campaign.

form.formComment: Has been racing well this preparation and showed plenty of improvement following March 21 run. Last start won by 1.4 m (Sr2) at this track (1:55.50) beating Tremendous Sensation in 4yo+ No NR M on March 28 at $41. Won from a similar draw last start but prepared to look elsewhere.
